
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggsignif)
library(patchwork)
library(qs)
library(ggvenn)

'%ni%'=Negate('%in%')

setwd("/home/xumeng/TCR_Dynamic/code4fithub/Fig2/Fig2d-l/")

mycol <- c("#D62728", "#1F77B4",  "#FF7F0E", "#2CA02C", "#9467BD", "#8C564B", "#E377C2", "#BCBD22", "#17BECF", "#FF9896", "#AEC7E8", "#FFBB78", "#98DF8A",  "#C5B0D5",  "#C49C94",  "#F7B6D2", "#7F7F7F", "#DBDB8D", "#9EDAE5", "#45aab4","#fe7966","#81d0bb","#f9637c","#fbb45c","#038dpost","#FFDE99","#B8C8F5","#8fa2dc","#feaac2","#206491", "gold", "seagreen", "tomato", "#285d7c", "#f1d19e", "#e5807c", "#d7969a", "#eeebd8", "#d97d56", "#eecca9", "#eeeddb", "#494651", "#4b98a9", "#719eb6", "#679bc5", "#d94248", "#ebd66d", "#62985a", "#ecc832", "#e1a34e", "#ac3241", "#f5812d", "#d63833", "#ef5a30")

```


```{r}

td_meta <- qread("/home/xumeng/TCR_Dynamic/ICB_T/clusters_analysis_2-1/td_meta.qs")

head(td_meta)

unique(td_meta$pt) %>% unique()

table(td_meta$pt, td_meta$TCR)

td_meta <- td_meta %>%
  mutate(TCR = case_when(
    is.na(cdr3b) ~ "no_TCR",
    TRUE ~ "TCR"
  ))

td_TCR_meta <- subset(td_meta, TCR == "TCR")

result <- td_TCR_meta %>%
  group_by(patient, cdr3b, treatment, datasets) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = treatment,
    values_from = count,
    values_fill = 0
  )

head(result)

result$pt <- paste0(result$patient, "@", result$datasets)

unique(result$pt) %>% unique()


result <- result %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      pre > 0 & post == 0 ~ "pre-only",
      pre == 0 & post > 0 ~ "emergent",
      pre > 0 & post > 0 ~ "pre-existing"
    )
  )

qsave(result, "ICB_sc_TCR.qs")

result <- qread("ICB_sc_TCR.qs")

result1 <- td_TCR_meta %>%
  group_by(pt, cdr3b, treatment, clusters) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = treatment,
    values_from = count,
    values_fill = 0
  )

head(result1)

result1 <- result1 %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      pre > 0 & post == 0 ~ "pre-only",
      pre == 0 & post > 0 ~ "emergent",
      pre > 0 & post > 0 ~ "pre-existing"
    )
  )

qsave(result1, "ICB_sc_TCR_clusters.qs")



result1 <- qread("ICB_sc_TCR_clusters.qs")

```



```{r}

head(result)

data4dis_wide <- result

data4dis_long <- data4dis_wide %>%
  gather(key = "time", value = "count", pre, post)

head(data4dis_long)

data4dis_long_1 <- subset(data4dis_long, count > 0)

head(data4dis_long_1)

data4dis_long_1$time_status <- paste0(data4dis_long_1$time, "@", data4dis_long_1$status)

data4dis_long_1$sampleid <- paste0(data4dis_long_1$patient, "@", data4dis_long_1$time)
```


## fig. 2h

```{r}

head(data4dis_long_1)

data4dis_long_1$pt <- paste0(data4dis_long_1$patient, "@", data4dis_long_1$datasets)

pat_status <- table(data4dis_long_1$pt, data4dis_long_1$time_status) %>% as.data.frame()

head(pat_status)

group = "time_status"

colnames(pat_status) <- c("patient", group, "count")

pat_status

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(time_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

pat_status$sampleid <- paste0(pat_status$patient, "@", pat_status$time)

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  group_by(sampleid) %>%
  mutate(proportion = count / sum(count))

colnames(pat_status)[2] <- "group"

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(pt = str_split(patient, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(patient, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(status = str_split(group, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(status = case_when(
    status == "emergent" ~ "only",
    status == "pre-only" ~ "only",
    TRUE ~ "across"
  ))


head(pat_status)

pat_status$time <- factor(pat_status$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))
pat_status$status <- factor(pat_status$status, levels = c("only", "across"))


pat_status <- pat_status %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    pt %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    pt %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    pt %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    pt %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    pt %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    pt %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    pt %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    pt %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    pt %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    pt %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))

head(pat_status)


p1 <- ggplot(subset(pat_status, response != "no_data"), aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = F, linewidth = 0.2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycol) + 
# geom_line(aes(group = patient), color = "grey", alpha = 0.8, lwd = 0.4, position = position_dodge(0.5))+  
# geom_jitter(aes(color = status), size= 0.8)+
geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.9, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
# scale_color_manual(values = mycol) +  
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
facet_grid(time ~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "TCR Ratio",
    color = "TCR Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("only", "across")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p1

```



## Fig. 2i

```{r}



p2 <- ggplot(subset(pat_status, response != "no_data"), aes(x = time, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = F, linewidth = 0.2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycol) + 
# geom_line(aes(group = patient), color = "grey", alpha = 0.8, lwd = 0.4, position = position_dodge(0.5))+  
# geom_jitter(aes(color = status), size= 0.8)+
geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.9, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
# scale_color_manual(values = mycol) +  
scale_color_manual(values = c("#8f8070", "#a54633")) +  
facet_grid(status ~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "TCR Ratio",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "TCR Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("pre", "post")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p2

```


## Fig. 2j

```{r}


p3 <- ggplot(subset(pat_status, response != "no_data"), aes(x = response, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = response)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = F, linewidth = 0.2) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycol) + 
# geom_line(aes(group = patient), color = "grey", alpha = 0.8, lwd = 0.4, position = position_dodge(0.5))+  
# geom_jitter(aes(color = status), size= 0.8)+
geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.9, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
# scale_color_manual(values = mycol) +  
scale_color_manual(values = c("#98989d", "#856e91")) +  
facet_grid(status ~ time, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "TCR Ratio",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "TCR Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("R", "NR")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p3


```




## Fig. 2k

```{r}

head(data4dis_long_1)


data4dis_long_1 <- data4dis_long_1 %>%
group_by(sampleid) %>%
mutate(expansion = ifelse(count >= 2*median(count), "ex", "nex")) %>%
ungroup()


data4dis_long_1$patient_time_status <- paste0(data4dis_long_1$pt, "@", data4dis_long_1$time, "@", data4dis_long_1$status)


ex_data <- data4dis_long_1 %>%
  group_by(patient_time_status, expansion, datasets) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(patient_time_status) %>%
  mutate(proportion = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()


head(ex_data)

ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(patient = str_split(patient_time_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(patient_time_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(patient_time_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])

ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(status = str_split(patient_time_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[,4])

ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(status = case_when(
    status == "emergent" ~ "only",
    status == "pre-only" ~ "only",
    TRUE ~ "across"
  ))


ex_data <- ex_data %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    patient %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    patient %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    patient %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))

head(pat_status)

head(ex_data)

ex_data$time <- factor(ex_data$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))
ex_data$status <- factor(ex_data$status, levels = c("only", "across"))
ex_data$response <- factor(ex_data$response, levels = c("R", "NR", "no_data"))

comp <- list(c("only", "across"))

p1 <- ggplot(subset(ex_data, expansion == "ex" & response != "no_data"), aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = F, linewidth = 0.2) + 
  # scale_fill_manual(values = mycol) + 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
# geom_line(aes(group = patient), color = "grey", alpha = 0.8, lwd = 0.4, position = position_dodge(0.5))+  
# geom_jitter(aes(color = status), size= 0.8)+
geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.9, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
# scale_color_manual(values = mycol) +  
facet_grid(time ~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Ex TCR Ratio",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "time status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = comp, step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p1

```


## Fig. 2f


```{r}

sc_long <- result %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pre, post), 
               names_to = "time", 
               values_to = "count")

head(sc_long)

sc_long$sample <- paste0(sc_long$patient, "@", sc_long$datasets, "@", sc_long$time)

sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "sample")]


sc4div <- subset(sc4div, count > 0)

sc4div_wide <- sc4div %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample,       
    values_from = count,  
    values_fill = list(count = 0)  
  ) %>% as.data.frame()

rownames(sc4div_wide) <- sc4div_wide$cdr3b

sc4div_wide$cdr3b <- NULL

sc4div_wide[1:6, 1:6]

library("vegan")

Shannon <- diversity(t(sc4div_wide), index = 'shannon', base = exp(1))

Shannon <- Shannon %>% as.data.frame()

colnames(Shannon) <- "shannon"

head(Shannon)

Shannon$p_status <- rownames(Shannon)

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(patient = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])


Shannon$time <- factor(Shannon$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))


library(ggsci)

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    patient %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    patient %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    patient %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))



p2 <- ggplot(subset(Shannon, response != "no_data"), aes(x = time, y = as.numeric(shannon), color = time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = time), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#8f8070", "#a54633")) +  
# facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
facet_grid( ~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Shannon Index",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("pre", "post")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = T),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p2




```



## Extended Data Fig. 1f


```{r}

sc_long <- result %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pre, post), 
               names_to = "time", 
               values_to = "count")

head(sc_long)


sc_long$p_status <- paste0(sc_long$patient, "@", sc_long$datasets, "@", sc_long$time, "@", sc_long$status)

sc_long$sample <- paste0(sc_long$patient, "@", sc_long$datasets, "@", sc_long$time)

sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "p_status")]
# sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "sample")]

sc4div <- subset(sc4div, count > 0)

sc4div_wide <- sc4div %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = p_status,       
    # names_from = sample,       
    values_from = count,  
    values_fill = list(count = 0)  
  ) %>% as.data.frame()

rownames(sc4div_wide) <- sc4div_wide$cdr3b

sc4div_wide$cdr3b <- NULL

sc4div_wide[1:6, 1:6]

library("vegan")

Shannon <- diversity(t(sc4div_wide), index = 'shannon', base = exp(1))

Shannon <- Shannon %>% as.data.frame()

colnames(Shannon) <- "shannon"

head(Shannon)

Shannon$p_status <- rownames(Shannon)

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(patient = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(status = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 4])

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(status = case_when(
    status == "emergent" ~ "only",
    status == "pre-only" ~ "only",
    TRUE ~ "across"
  ))

head(Shannon)

Shannon$time <- factor(Shannon$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))
Shannon$status <- factor(Shannon$status, levels = c("only", "across"))

library(ggsci)

Shannon <- Shannon %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    patient %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    patient %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    patient %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))



p1 <- ggplot(subset(Shannon, response != "no_data"), aes(x = time, y = as.numeric(shannon), color = time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = time), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#8f8070", "#a54633")) +  
# facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
facet_grid(status ~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "wilcox-test",
    x = "",
    y = "Shannon Index",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("pre", "post")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = T),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )

p1

```


## Extended Data Fig. 1g

```{r}



p1 <- ggplot(subset(Shannon, response != "no_data"), aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(shannon), color = status)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = status), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
facet_grid(time ~ response, scales = "free_y") +
# facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "wilcox-test",
    x = "",
    y = "Shannon Index",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("only", "across")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p1




```





## Fig. 2e


```{r}

sc_long <- result %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pre, post), 
               names_to = "time", 
               values_to = "count")

head(sc_long)

sc_long$sample <- paste0(sc_long$patient, "@", sc_long$datasets, "@", sc_long$time)

sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "sample")]


sc4div <- subset(sc4div, count > 0)

sc4div_wide <- sc4div %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = sample,       
    values_from = count,  
    values_fill = list(count = 0)  
  ) %>% as.data.frame()

rownames(sc4div_wide) <- sc4div_wide$cdr3b

sc4div_wide$cdr3b <- NULL

index_df_1 <- calculate_clonality(sc4div_wide)

index_df_1
  
colnames(index_df_1) <- c("p_status", "clonality")

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(patient = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])

index_df_1$time <- factor(index_df_1$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))


index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    patient %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    patient %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    patient %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))



p1 <- ggplot(subset(index_df_1, response != "no_data"), aes(x = time, y = as.numeric(clonality), color = time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = time), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#8f8070", "#a54633")) +  
# facet_grid(status ~ response, scales = "free_y") +
facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Clonality",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("pre", "post")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = T),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )

p1



```





## Extended Data Fig. 1e


```{r}


sc_long <- result %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(pre, post), 
               names_to = "time", 
               values_to = "count")

head(sc_long)


sc_long$p_status <- paste0(sc_long$patient, "@", sc_long$datasets, "@", sc_long$time, "@", sc_long$status)

sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "p_status")]
# sc4div <- sc_long[, c("cdr3b", "count", "sample")]

sc4div <- subset(sc4div, count > 0)

sc4div_wide <- sc4div %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = p_status,       
    # names_from = sample,       
    values_from = count,  
    values_fill = list(count = 0)  
  ) %>% as.data.frame()

rownames(sc4div_wide) <- sc4div_wide$cdr3b

sc4div_wide$cdr3b <- NULL

head(sc4div_wide)

source("/soft/sim/R_package/ArchTCR/R/utilities.R")

index_df_1 <- calculate_clonality(sc4div_wide)

index_df_1
  
colnames(index_df_1) <- c("p_status", "clonality")

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(patient = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(datasets = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(time = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 3])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(status = str_split(p_status, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 4])

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(status = case_when(
    status == "emergent" ~ "only",
    status == "pre-only" ~ "only",
    TRUE ~ "across"
  ))

head(index_df_1)

index_df_1$time <- factor(index_df_1$time, levels = c("pre", "post"))
index_df_1$status <- factor(index_df_1$status, levels = c("only", "across"))

index_df_1 <- index_df_1 %>%
  mutate(response = case_when(
    patient %in% c("su001", "su002", "su003", "su004", "su009", "su012") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "R", # 
    patient %in% c("su005", "su006", "su007", "su008",  "su010") & datasets == "BCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("su010","su011") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("su013", "su014") & datasets == "SCC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P001", "P002",  "P004", "P005", "P016","P017") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P007", "P010", "P012", "P019") & datasets == "BC_zhang" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P18_HN", "P32_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P24_HN", "P27_HN", "P29_HN") & datasets == "HN" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P02", "P03", "P04", "P06", "P08") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P05", "P07", "P09") & datasets == "ESCC" ~ "NR",


    patient %in% c("P01", "P04", "P08", "P11", "P12", "P15", "P17", "P18", "P19", "P20", "P22", "P23","P26", "P03", "P05", "P09", "P14", "P24") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("P16","P25") & datasets == "CRC" ~ "NR",

    patient %in% c("P29", "P30", "P33", "P35") & datasets == "Lung" ~ "R",

    patient %in% c("Patient01",   "Patient02",   "Patient03T1", "Patient03T2", "Patient04",   "Patient05",   "Patient07" ,  "Patient09" ,  "Patient11" ,  "Patient12" ,  "Patient16",   "Patient18", "Patient19",   "Patient20",   "Patient23" ,  "Patient30" ,  "Patient42",   "Patient43" ,  "Patient46" ,  "Patient47" ,  "Patient48" ,  "Patient56" ,  "Patient63" ,  "Patient66") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "R",
    patient %in% c("Patient06", "Patient10", "Patient15", "Patient17", "Patient26", "Patient39", "Patient45", "Patient52", "Patient53", "Patient57", "Patient64") & datasets == "BC_Shiao" ~ "NR",

    TRUE ~ "no_data"  
  ))


p1 <- ggplot(subset(index_df_1, response != "no_data"), aes(x = time, y = as.numeric(clonality), color = time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = time), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#8f8070", "#a54633")) +  
facet_grid(status ~ response, scales = "free_y") +
# facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Clonality",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("pre", "post")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = T),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p1

```


## Extended Data Fig. 1h


```{r}

p1 <- ggplot(subset(index_df_1, response != "no_data"), aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(clonality), color = status)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.3, outliers = FALSE, linewidth = 0.2) + 
geom_point( aes( color = status), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
facet_grid(time ~ response, scales = "free_y") +
# facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Clonality",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("only", "across")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = F, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )


p1


```



## datasets level


## Extended Data Fig. 1j,k

```{r}



summary_dat <- pat_status %>%  
# group_by(time, status) %>%  
group_by(datasets, time, status) %>%  
summarise(    Mean = mean(proportion),    
SE = sd(proportion)/sqrt(n())  )

# head(summary_dat)

p <- ggplot() +  
geom_bar(data = pat_status, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status), stat = "summary", fun = "mean", fill = "white", linewidth = 0.2, width = 0.7 ) +  
geom_point(data = pat_status, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.7, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
geom_errorbar(data = summary_dat, aes(x = status, ymin = Mean - SE, ymax = Mean + SE), width = 0.25, size = 0.2, color = "black") +
# stat_summary(data = pat_status, aes(color = status), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.4, size = 1, fun.min = summary_min(), fun.max = summary_max ) +  
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1.1)) +  
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
facet_grid(time ~ datasets, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "TCR Ratio",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "time status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(data = pat_status, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion)),
    comparisons = list(c("only", "across")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = T, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = FALSE),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )

p

ex_data_1 <- subset(ex_data, expansion == "ex")

head(ex_data_1)


summary_dat <- ex_data_1 %>%  
# group_by(time, status) %>%  
group_by(datasets, time, status) %>%  
summarise(    Mean = mean(proportion),    
SE = sd(proportion)/sqrt(n())  )

# head(summary_dat)


p <- ggplot() +  
geom_bar(data = ex_data_1, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status), stat = "summary", fun = "mean", fill = "white", linewidth = 0.2, width = 0.7 ) +  
geom_point(data = ex_data_1, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion), color = status), position = position_jitterdodge(0.95), alpha = 0.7, size = 1.2, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+ 
geom_errorbar(data = summary_dat, aes(x = status, ymin = Mean - SE, ymax = Mean + SE), width = 0.25, size = 0.2, color = "black") +
# stat_summary(data = pat_status, aes(color = status), geom = "errorbar", width = 0.4, size = 1, fun.min = summary_min(), fun.max = summary_max ) +  
scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 1.1)) +  
scale_color_manual(values = c("#e59f24", "#57acaa")) +  
facet_grid(time ~ datasets, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "TCR Ratio",
    # fill = "Metric",
    color = "time status"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size=6, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(size=7, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),  
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid=element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "white", fill = "white"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 7, colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size=6),
    legend.title = element_text(size=7),
  ) +
  geom_signif(data = ex_data_1, aes(x = status, y = as.numeric(proportion)),
    comparisons = list(c("only", "across")), step_increase = 0.08,
    map_signif_level = T, test = "wilcox.test", test.args=list(alternative = "two.side", paired = FALSE),
    tip_length = c(0), color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
  )

p



```
